title: Nana Diy Dress Cake
description: Nana DIY Dress & Cake is a casual simulation game. Welcome to Nanas handicraft workshop. How to make an ordinary white skirt look dazzling? This requires a series of process operations. First, dye the jumpsuit with the color you like. You can choose solid color or tie-dye. Then spray the skirt with a special pattern. A beautiful skirt is ready, put it on and try it on! Now that the clothes are done, let’s start making the cake!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
